about: Software Developer with 2+ years of hands-on experience designing and deploying data transfer and automation systems on cloud (AWS, Azure) and on-premises infrastructure with a strong focus on clean, maintainable, and scalable code.
Student of Literature and Judaic Studies, The Open University of Israel – President’s Award for Academic Excellence, 2025.

points.text: real-time data pipelines powering production intelligence systems.
that orchestrate data pipeline duplication, processing millions of files daily with near zero downtime.
